source.title: Safwa-tul-Masaadir (صفوة المصادر) — Arabic-English edition
source.author: Maulana Mushtaaq Ahmed Charthawali
source.section: Al-Thulathi al-Mujarrad (الثلاثي المجرد) — the three root-letter verbs

fields.masdar: verbal noun (المصدر), as printed with definite article
fields.bab: one of: nasara, daraba, samia, fataha, karuma, hasiba
fields.verb_type: book subsection: sahih, mudaaf, mahmuz_fa/ain/lam, mithal_wawi/yai, ajwaf_wawi/yai, naqis_wawi/yai, lafif_mafruq/maqrun
fields.book_page: page number in the printed book
fields.transcription_note: present only where the print showed something unusual

enrichment.description: Fields added by scripts/enrich-vocabulary.py. Original printed values were copied through untouched. Roots were reconstructed from the printed forms plus the book's verb-type classification and cross-checked internally; they are labelled internally_validated, NOT verified, because no external authoritative source has been consulted. Quiz eligibility is field-level: a transcription concern disables only the exact field(s) it affects. Passives/ism maf'ul were generated only for verbs heuristically classified transitive, are blocked while transitivity is under review, and are quiz-ineligible until independently verified. Anything uncertain is needs_review (see docs/manual-review-required.md).

status_definitions.source_transcribed: value transcribed from the printed book (all original fields)
status_definitions.internally_validated: reconstructed value cross-checked only against other printed forms of the same book; no external source consulted
status_definitions.algorithmically_derived: produced by a documented rule; no independent confirmation of any kind
status_definitions.verified: independently verified against an external authoritative source recorded in provenance (currently unused)
status_definitions.needs_review: conflicting or insufficient evidence; a human must decide
status_definitions.blocked_by_transitivity_review: generated form intentionally not produced because the entry's transitivity is under review; unblocks when that review is resolved
status_definitions.not_applicable: the form does not exist for this entry
status_definitions.curated: set explicitly by a human-maintained override table in the enrichment script
